chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1028 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4000/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 24.09.2024 M/s Achar Khan Gabol and Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocates for the petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Muhammad Akhtar Pathan, on behalf of DIGP, Sukkur >>>>>...<<<<<<< Learned AAG has filed comments of respondent No.3, taken on record, copy supplied to the counsel for the petitioner. Learned AAG draws this Court’s attention to the application filed on 04.07.2024 by both the petitioners before respondent No.2 /IG Police and that the petition was immediately filed thereafter. Be that as it may, let the application moved by the petitioners available at page 21-25 be decided by the concerned authority / respondent No.2 in accordance with the law within one month. Upon this, Counsel for the petitioners does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of in the above terms along with pending application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
